title: Sourcing Inquiry
description: Inbound sourcing inquiry submitted by an overseas buyer.

full_name.description: Full name of the person submitting the inquiry.

email.description: Business email address used for follow-up.

phone.description: Phone number or WhatsApp / WeChat handle.

product_category.description: Product category the buyer wants to source.

target_quantity.description: Estimated order quantity or trial order size.

target_unit_price.description: Target unit price range the buyer has in mind.

services_needed.description: Comma-separated list of services the buyer needs.

source_page.description: The page or campaign the inquiry originated from.

status.description: Internal handling status of the inquiry.
